Notice Of Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel Defendant Sun Ship, Llc, To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition
Off Calendar Oct-08-2014 Continued To Oct-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Simon S. Grille of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Laura Conners, et al.
Todd M. Thacker of JACKSON, JENKINS & RENSTROM, LLP (415-982-3600), appearing for defendant / opposing party Sun Ship, LLC

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS CONNERS, LAURA, AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR, AND AS SUCCESSOR-IN-INTERESTS TO PHIL AIKEN, ET AL.'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT SUN SHIP, LLC, TO PRODUCE ITS CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS AND PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE FOR DEPOSITION AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS AT DEPOSITION

Hearing held. The Court made the following ruling: Plaintiffs' motion to compel defendant Sun Ship, LLC to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and to produce documents at deposition is granted. The estimated time for deposition of Jonathan Waller is 2 hours. Defendant has not waived its privilege and work products. Defendant will provide plaintiffs the complete access to its documents. The Court will not impose sanctions. This matter is continued to October 16, 2014 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 503 for a further hearing. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Tara L. Williams of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #13428 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
